output.goal: extract the list of movies released this week along with their genres

result.error: all layers exhausted; last: vision error: Error: Page.evaluate: Execution context was destroyed, most likely because of a navigation

prompt_sent:
The Browser skill fetches and interacts with web pages. It walks a
four-layer cascade starting from the cheapest path (HTML extraction)
and escalating only when needed (deterministic selectors, accessibility
tree, then visual set-of-marks with a vision model). The escalation
is internal; you pass `url` and `goal`, the skill chooses the layer.

Inputs: `metadata.url` (required), `metadata.goal` (required, free-text
description of what to extract or do). Output: `BrowserOutput` with
`content` (for extraction goals) or `actions` plus `final_url` (for
interaction goals), and `path` reporting the cascade layer that
actually ran. When the page is gated by CAPTCHA or login, the skill
returns `error_code="gateway_blocked"` and no content; the Planner
should route around by trying a different source URL or by handing
back to the user.

MEMORY HITS (8 from FAISS):
  - [fact] Comparison of GitHub Copilot, Codeium, and Tabnine free vs paid plans.
      source: user_query
      raw: Compare GitHub Copilot, Codeium, and Tabnine free vs paid plans. Use browser on each tool's official pricing page with at least 3 visible actions per site (navigate, click pricing or expand plan details, scroll). Include a structured comparison table.
  - [fact] Compare 5 AI coding tools: Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Codeium, Tabnine, Amazon Q Developer by free and paid plans.
      source: user_query
  - [fact] Compare 5 AI coding tools based on free and paid plans with browser actions.
      source: user_query
      raw: Compare 5 AI coding tools by free plan and paid plan. The agent must perform at least three visible browser actions, such as search, filter, sort, open product/detail pages, switch tabs, expand hidden content, or submit a form. Passive scraping from search snippets is not accepted. The final output must include a structured comparison table.
  - [fact] Compare 3 laptops under Rs 80000
      source: user_query
      raw: Compare 3 laptops under Rs 80000
